evals.prompt: My PM asked me 'how long will it take to build a notification system?' I have a feature plan with 8 tasks. Help me estimate and communicate this to the PM.
evals.expected_output: Should walk through estimating each task, choose appropriate method, calculate total with buffer, and produce stakeholder-friendly communication with ranges.
assertions: Chooses an appropriate estimation method for the context
Estimates each task individually, not the project as a single unit
Produces a range, not a single number
Communicates in stakeholder-friendly language (weeks, not story points)
Does NOT promise a specific date without qualifying it

evals.prompt: Our VP wants a budget estimate for a 6-month data platform rebuild. We're in early discovery and a lot is still unknown. How do I estimate this responsibly?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend three-point estimation for high-uncertainty work, produce wide ranges, clearly state assumptions and unknowns, and suggest narrowing the estimate through phased discovery.
assertions: Recommends three-point estimation due to high uncertainty
Produces wide initial ranges (appropriate for early discovery)
Suggests a phased approach: estimate phase 1 tightly, phases 2-3 loosely
Clearly states which assumptions drive the estimate
Recommends a technical spike before committing to precise numbers
Does NOT produce a precise single-number estimate for 6 months of unknown work
